item.title: git is quite convenient
item.description: emo delete your posts they're under the git a few weeks pass you come back and resurrect them quite convenient by me

item.title: i like jack 2

item.title: i like jack
item.description: https://block.xyz/inside/fromhierarchytointelligence great article about new possibilites for org structures and stuff thoughts from chat with a friend: "мне понравилось что это глоток чего то свежего, что персонаж подсвечивает действительн

item.title: music march
item.description: Knocked Loose "Hive Mind" ft. Denzel Curry https://youtu.be/hBn7D3Cxsp0?si=QsfvXD3ijgerLp9s Knocked Loose "Don't Reach For Me" https://youtu.be/HlOFqHXH368?si=P21X4glys3PQgXOG Saosin Seven Years Cover by TORWAI https://youtu.be/TKP66GhUN2Q?

item.title: turing 101
item.description: there are two types of Turing machines, "Regular" and "Universal" "Universal" is a chef in a restaurant any recipe any dish, "Regular" is a person who is trained to do french fries only one recipe one french fry, forever, french fries unive
